title: Set up TanStack Query (React Query) in Next.js
summary: Add TanStack Query v5 for client-side data fetching, caching, and server state management in Next.js App Router, including devtools and server-side prefetching.
declaration: I will set up TanStack Query v5 for client-side data fetching and server state management. TanStack Query handles caching, background refetching, and loading/error states automatically. If you prefer SWR instead, say so before I begin.
